arts.ttl: Exact Sheffield United points tally predicted amid Leeds United and Burnley promotion race
arts.sum: United are second in the Championship table thanks to Sheffield United's 3-1 win over Coventry City on Friday night. The prediction also believes that Sheffield United will finish narrowly behind Leeds on 96 (95.7) points, which would complete the top two spots and automatic promotion spots.

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Swansea City on TV? Live stream, kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: United will take on Swansea City at Elland Road as they continue their push to secure automatic promotion to the Premier League . What time does Leeds United vs Swansea City kick-off?

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke to show Leeds United risk policy vs Swansea amid play-off danger
arts.sum: United start their run-in with a home game against Swansea City on Saturday. Daniel Farke has outlined how four home wins will put the Whites in a very strong position amid some tricky away fixtures.

arts.ttl: Leeds v Swansea: Harry Gray debut? Farke responds
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Swansea City this afternoon, and as Patrick Bamford continues to work his way back to fitness, the door could be open for Harry Gray to catch Daniel Farke’s eye. The next in line could be Harry Gray, 16, having featured in pre-season for Leeds and being part of first-team training at stages this campaign, but Farke isn’t too keen to put any pressure on him amid Bamford’s continued absence from the squad.

arts.ttl: International defender coy on Nottingham Forest future amid Leeds United transfer talk
arts.sum: Andrew Omobamidele says he has yet to make a decision over his long term future amid speculation linking him with a summer move to Leeds United. Omobamidele is currently on loan at Strasbourg until the end of the season, having struggled to make an impression at the City Ground since joining from Norwich City for £11m in 2023.

arts.ttl: Leeds: Inevitable Ramazani exit rumours, Farke must change
arts.sum: Spanish outlet El Gol Digital have claimed this week that Leeds winger Largie Ramazani is attracting interest from Segunda Division club Deportivo La Coruna. Largie Ramazani is barely getting a look in at the moment for Leeds United, and it’s unsurprisingly seeing him speculated with a move away, as unlikely as the move in question would be.

arts.ttl: Cameron Archer to Leeds United transfer verdict delivered as key condition made clear
arts.sum: Archer's two goals in 26 Premier League games proves he is not the signing Leeds need. United will need to bring in a marquee striker next summer, someone to succeed Joel Piroe, and Archer is clearly not that man.

arts.ttl: Leeds United notebook - Transfer exit sanctioned, Piroe snub and training ground mood for run-in - Leeds Live
arts.sum: A United statement read: "Everyone at the club wishes Darryl well during his time at Victoria Park and we look forward to seeing his further development." Anthony Limbrick’s Hartlepool outfit currently sit eight points adrift of the play-off positions in the Vanarama National League. A Hartlepool statement said: "Hartlepool United are pleased to announce the signing of young goalkeeper Darryl Ombang on loan from Leeds United until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Leeds: Farke must change Isaac Schmidt stance ASAP
arts.sum: Leeds United full-back Isaac Schmidt has suggested that he has been considering his future at the club amidst an absence of game time. With Jayden Bogle and Junior Firpo, he has two of the best in the division, but that also means that there’s not been enough opportunities to see Isaac Schmidt in the Championship.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Swansea City as Daniel Farke makes Wilfried Gnonto decision
arts.sum: It is the crunch time in the season so Farke will not want to take any risks with Gnonto. Boss Daniel Farke rated Gnonto as "50/50" to line up against the Swans.
